8.description: sort buildings by distance to centroid ascending

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade AS geometry, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = 'Høy' AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_GeomFromEWKT(:trondheim_geometry))

2.description: get high-risk quick-clay hazard areas filtered by municipality geometry

4.description: find buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

2.sql: SELECT geometry FROM kvikkleire.kvikkleire_omrade WHERE risikoklasse = '5' AND ST_Intersects(geometry, ST_GeomFromEWKT('SRID=25833;POLYGON((...))'));

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct risk class values to confirm high risk stored value

3.description: get quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class filtered by municipality geometry

5.description: find buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: compute municipality centroid from step 1 geometry

7.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

9.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending for tie-breaker

replan_trigger.error: Step 2 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).
